title: Simple Orbital Strike Mod
description: Adds orbital strikes like seen in Wemmbu's videos, no machine building needed.
body:
# Simple Orbital Strike Cannon

Fire an orbital strike from your fishing rod.

---

## How it works

1. Use the command to get a rod: `/orbitalstrike <stab|nuke>`
2. Aim at a target
3. Right-click - a strike falls from the sky 1 second later

**Two strike types:**
- **Stab** - a precision column of TNT that drops from build height straight down. Surgical destruction.
- **Nuke** - a massive ring explosion that spreads outward in concentric waves. Everything in the area goes up.

---

## Configuration (Mod Menu)

Install [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) and [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) to get an in-game settings screen. All settings are server-side configurable.

| Setting | Default | Description |
|---------|---------|-------------|
| Nuke Radius | 30 | Max ring radius (blocks) |
| Ring Step | 3 | Gap between rings |
| TNT Fuse | 80 ticks | How long before TNT explodes |
| Strike Delay | 1000ms | How long after firing before impact |
| Permission Level | 2 | Op level required for `/orbitalstrike` |

Settings save to `config/orbitalstrike.json` on the server.

---

## NeoForge

NeoForge versions are available for 1.21.x and 26.1.x. Same features, same configurable settings using NeoForge's built-in config system.

---

## Supported Loaders
- Fabric (+ Quilt compatible)
- NeoForge

## Commands
- `/orbitalstrike stab` - gives 1 stab rod
- `/orbitalstrike nuke` - gives 1 nuke rod
- `/orbitalstrike nuke 5` - gives 5 nuke rods
